252.reason: [When encountering a single '&' or '|', the code correctly detects an error, but it still proceeds to output the erroneous token to lexer.txt via printToLexer() after this block, which violates the requirement that erroneous programs should only output to error.txt and not produce any lexer tokens.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&' or '|', the code correctly detects an error, but it still proceeds to output the erroneous token to lexer.txt via printToLexer() after this block, which violates the requirement that erroneous programs should only output to error.txt and not produce any lexer tokens.]
